Description:
Ballistics of the 53-VOF-547 with projectile 53-OF-547 fired from the M-47 152.4mm gun. The ammunition and gun is produced with modification in PRC as the WB008P high explosive fragmentation shell, fired from the Type 59 152mm gun.

Chamber measures 882mm from breech to the start of the rifling. Bore length is 6350 mm. Loads 10.67 kg of NDT-3 (双芳-3) 19/1-32 grains. Peak breech pressure measures 2350 kgf/cm² from copper crusher gauge, converts to 258 MPa piezoelectric with factor of 1.12 x 0.098. Projectile travel is given as 55.77dm, chamber volume is given as 17.27 L. Projectile travel given as 55.77 dm, chamber volume 17.27 L.

References
- table from Физические основы устройства и функционирования стрельково-пушечного, артиллерийского и ракетного оружия, Часть I, Воронежский государственный технический университет, 2003 (projectile travel, chamber volume)
- chapter 1959年式152毫米加农炮 in 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
